title: MCP tools: launch and monitor dark factory sessions
description: Add two new MCP tools so Signal users can trigger and monitor dark-factory runs from chat: start_dark_factory (opens kitty terminal with zellij + Claude) and read_dark_factory (parses Claude conversation JSONL files for progress).
acceptanceCriteria: start_dark_factory takes an issue_number, opens kitty + zellij + interactive Claude, returns session name
read_dark_factory takes a session_name, parses JSONL conversation files, returns recent assistant messages and tool usage
Session metadata stored in factory/sessions/<name>.json for correlation
Both tools follow existing MCP server patterns (catchErrors, ok/error, validation)
Unit tests for input validation and JSONL parsing
All existing tests continue to pass
